title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Pantaloons Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Pantaloons Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pantaloons Ventures Solutions:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons Ventures Solutions!
